title: orthodon perforatus
intro: Orthodon perforatus, also known as Toothache Plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its analgesic and anti-inflammatory effects, making it effective in treating toothache and other oral health issues. Its health benefits include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as providing relief from fever and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Orthodon perforatus typically involve making a tea from the leaves or using the plant in tincture form to harness its medicinal properties.
